name: Pujing [Universal Purity]
page_title: Pujing “Universal Purity” 普淨 “普淨” – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
ranks: Monk of the State Guardian Temple

sections.short-biography: Monk. Warned Guan Yu of Bian Xi’s plot. Later helped Guan Yu’s spirit to find peace.
sections.details:
Nickname 
	“Universal Purity” (Pujing 普淨)


	 Traditional Chinese 
	普淨 “普淨”


	 Simplified Chinese 
	普净


	 Pronunciation 
	Pu3jing4


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Pǔjìng “Pǔjìng”


	 Wade-Giles 
	P‘uching “P‘u-ching”

	 Birthplace 
	Xie County, Hedong (Pujing comes from the same village as Guan Yu.)

	 Other Names 
	Universal Purity, Pu Jing, Transverse Peace

	 Name Notes 
	Pujing 普淨, a religious name, translates to Universal Purity. In the Brewitt-Taylor translation Pujing appears as Pu Jing and his name is translated as Transverse Peace. Other translations are possible.
sections.ranks: Monk of the State Guardian Temple

full_text:
Pujing “Universal Purity” 普淨 “普淨”
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pujing (普淨)aka“Universal Purity” (普淨)was born in Xie County, Hedong (Pujing comes from the same village as Guan Yu.). Monk. Warned Guan Yu of Bian Xi’s plot. Later helped Guan Yu’s spirit to find peace. Pujing is a fictional character.
